indications.text:
XOPENEX (levalbuterol HCl) Inhalation Solution is indicated for the treatment or prevention of
bronchospasm in adults, adolescents, and children 6 years of age and older with reversible
obstructive airway disease.

XOPENEX (levalbuterol HCl) Inhalation Solution is indicated for the treatment or prevention of
bronchospasm in adults, adolescents, and children 6 years of age and older with reversible
obstructive airway disease.

XOPENEX (levalbuterol HCl) Inhalation Solution Concentrate is indicated for the treatment or
prevention of bronchospasm in adults, adolescents, and children 6 years of age and older with
reversible obstructive airway disease.
